comments.body:
## Description

Create tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh with structural tests for the /dso:architect-foundation skill. Also update tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh to include architect-foundation.

### Tests:
- test_skill_file_exists: SKILL.md exists
- test_frontmatter_valid: name=architect-foundation, user-invocable=true
- test_sub_agent_guard_present: SUB-AGENT-GUARD block with Agent tool check
- test_reads_project_understanding: references .claude/project-understanding.md
- test_socratic_dialogue: contains Socratic dialogue pattern
- test_no_duplicate_detection: does not re-run project-detect.sh (delegates to project-understanding.md)
- test_enforcement_preferences: references enforcement/anti-pattern areas

### File Impact
- tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh (create)
- tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh (modify — add architect-foundation)
- .test-index (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] At least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] test-sub-agent-guard.sh includes architect-foundation
  Verify: grep -q 'architect-foundation' tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Ticket reviewed. Task requires creating tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh (7 tests), updating tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh (add architect-foundation to Group 1), and updating .test-index.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Read test-onboarding-skill.sh (21 tests, uses _snapshot_fail + assert_eq pattern) and test-sub-agent-guard.sh (19 skills, 38 tests in _TEST_GATE_ANCHORS, architect-foundation goes in Group 1 after ui-discover). Ready to create files.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Created tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh with 7 test functions (test_skill_file_exists, test_frontmatter_valid, test_sub_agent_guard_present, test_reads_project_understanding, test_socratic_dialogue, test_no_duplicate_detection, test_enforcement_preferences). All RED as SKILL.md does not exist yet.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Updated tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh: header updated (19→20 skills, 15→16 sub-agent dependent), added check_guard_agent_tool "architect-foundation" to Group 1, added test_architect_foundation_has_sub_agent_guard_marker and test_architect_foundation_guard_references_agent_tool to _TEST_GATE_ANCHORS.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validated all tests. test-architect-foundation-skill.sh: 1 PASSED (test_no_duplicate_detection), 6 FAILED RED as expected. test-sub-agent-guard.sh: 38 PASSED, 2 FAILED RED for architect-foundation (expected). .test-index entry added with [test_skill_file_exists] RED marker. Both acceptance criteria verified.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check complete. All 7 items verified: (1) test file exists, (2) 7 test functions, (3) guard test updated, (4) 2 anchors in _TEST_GATE_ANCHORS, (5) .test-index entry with [test_skill_file_exists] RED marker, (6) no project-detect.sh reference in new test, (7) header counts updated to 20 total / 16 sub-agent dependent. Task complete.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Created 7 RED tests for architect-foundation skill + .test-index entry. Guard test changes stashed — to be committed with GREEN task.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
